title: thymus × porcii subsp. pilisiensis
intro: Thymus × porcii subsp. pilisiensis, also known as Pilisi Thyme, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oil content, which is rich in thymol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pilisi Thyme include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as skin infections and wounds. Pilisi Thyme can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to soothe sore throats and alleviate digestive issues.
